mapper.sql: id, name, menu_ids, max_users, max_storage_mb, status, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_tenant_package WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_tenant_package SET name = #{name}, menu_ids = #{menuIds}, max_users = #{maxUsers}, max_storage_mb = #{maxStorageMb}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
UPDATE sys_tenant_package SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
